title: Junior Business Development Manager at HUDCO

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at HUDCO
jsonLd.description:
HUDCO, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Business Development Manager for our Kanpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About HUDCO:
HUDCO is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HUDCO!
